## About ScalewithFahad

ScalewithFahad is Germany’s professional eBay Dropshipping coaching and account management service. Founded and operated by Fahad bin Sultan in Erkrath, NRW, Germany. VAT ID: DE453914117.

## Services

- eBay Dropshipping Coaching Germany: €300 + 19% VAT
- eBay Account Management (50% profit share, no upfront fee)
- eBay Account Setup Germany: €100 + 19% VAT
- Product Research & Listing Optimization: €175 + 19% VAT
- Account Health & Performance: €150 + 19% VAT
- Shopify Store Setup Germany: €250 + 19% VAT
- Business Digitalization: €200 + 19% VAT
- Student Online Income Germany: €100 + 19% VAT
- 1:1 Consultation: €50 + 19% VAT

## Key Facts

- Minimum capital: €800-€1,000 (no warehouse needed)
- No upfront fee for account management
- 100% German VAT compliant (DE453914117)
- Trustpilot: 4.0 stars verified
- Languages: German, English, Urdu
- WhatsApp: +4915510532359
- Website: https://scalewithfahad.de
